inputs.label: Annual Compensation
inputs.businessContext: Total compensation from employment or net earnings from self-employment (before any contribution).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total compensation from employment or net earnings from self-employment (before any contribution).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstihdamdan elde edilen toplam tazminat veya serbest meslekten elde edilen net kazanç (herhangi bir katkıdan önce).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtvergütung aus Beschäftigung oder Nettoeinkommen aus selbstständiger Tätigkeit (vor etwaigen Beiträgen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rémunération totale provenant d'un emploi ou revenu net d'un travail indépendant (avant toute cotisation).

inputs.label: Contribution Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of compensation you contribute to the SEP IRA, up to 25% for employees and effectively lower for self-employed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of compensation you contribute to the SEP IRA, up to 25% for employees and effectively lower for self-employed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SEP IRA'ya katkıda bulunduğunuz tazminat yüzdesi; çalışanlar için %25'e kadar, serbest meslek sahipleri için etkin olarak daha düşük.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Prozentsatz der Vergütung, den Sie in den SEP IRA einzahlen, bis zu 25 % für Arbeitnehmer und effektiv niedriger für Selbstständige.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la rémunération que vous cotisez au SEP IRA, jusqu'à 25 % pour les employés et effectivement moins pour les travailleurs indépendants.

inputs.label: Self-Employed (0/1)
inputs.businessContext: Enter 1 if you are self-employed (the calculation adjusts for self-employment), otherwise 0 for employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter 1 if you are self-employed (the calculation adjusts for self-employment), otherwise 0 for employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Serbest meslek sahibiyseniz 1 girin (hesaplama serbest mesleğe göre ayarlanır), aksi halde çalışan için 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie 1 ein, wenn Sie selbstständig sind (die Berechnung passt sich an die Selbstständigkeit an), andernfalls 0 für Arbeitnehmer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez 1 si vous êtes travailleur indépendant (le calcul s'ajuste en fonction du travail indépendant), sinon 0 pour un employé.

inputs.label: IRS Contribution Limit
inputs.businessContext: The maximum annual contribution limit set by the IRS (e.g., $66,000 for 2023).

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum annual contribution limit set by the IRS (e.g., $66,000 for 2023).
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRS tarafından belirlenen maksimum yıllık katkı limiti (örneğin, 2023 için 66.000 $).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die vom IRS festgelegte maximale jährliche Beitragsgrenze (z. B. 66.000 $ für 2023).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le plafond annuel de cotisation fixé par l'IRS (par exemple, 66 000 $ pour 2023).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
